title: Force unwrap on XMLParser(contentsOf:) in loadFile
description: At line 397, XMLParser(contentsOf: url)! is force-unwrapped. The XMLParser(contentsOf:) initializer returns nil if the URL cannot be read. If the spec file is missing, moved, or has incorrect permissions, this force unwrap crashes the server at startup.
recommendation: Use guard: guard let parser = XMLParser(contentsOf: url) else { return false }; self.parser = parser
